name: CT-Guided Biopsy
description: Interventional radiology CT-guided biopsy procedure report template

findings.technique: CT-guided [core needle/fine needle] biopsy performed using [gauge] needle. Patient positioned [prone/supine/lateral] for optimal target access. Pre-procedure CT confirmed target lesion in [location] measuring [X]cm.
findings.comparison: Pre-procedure imaging demonstrates [lesion description] in [anatomic location] concerning for [malignancy/benign process].

sections.name: Target Localization
sections.content: Target lesion localized at [level] in [anterior/posterior]/[right/left/midline]. Estimated depth from skin: [X]cm.

sections.name: Approach
sections.content: [Posterior/Anterior/Lateral] approach chosen to avoid [lung/pleura/vessel/bowel]. Needle trajectory planned to minimize [pneumothorax risk/bleeding risk].

sections.name: Biopsy Performed
sections.content: [X] passes obtained using [automatic/manual] firing needle. Specimens submitted for [pathology/microbiology/flow cytometry].

sections.name: Post-Procedure
sections.content: Post-procedure CT [demonstrates no complications / demonstrates small pneumothorax / demonstrates hematoma] at biopsy site. Patient [tolerated / did not tolerate] procedure well.

impression:
1. CT-guided [core/FNA] biopsy of [location] lesion performed.
2. [X] passes obtained with [X] specimens submitted for pathologic analysis.
3. [No immediate complications / Complications as noted]: [describe].
4. Specimens submitted for [pathology/microbiology] analysis. Final diagnosis pending.
author: RadReport Templates
